zh.Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France: 法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne d'HARCOURT於1275年出生在法國時，她的父親Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux35歲，母親Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT36歲。她於1306年與Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年享年71歲。

zh-hans.Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France: 法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne d'HARCOURT于1275年出生在法国时，她的父亲Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux35岁，母亲Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT36岁。她于1306年与Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1346年享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'HARCOURT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne d'HARCOURT was born in 1275, in France, her father, Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux, was 35 and her mother, Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT, was 36. She married Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR in 1306. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1346, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne d'HARCOURT est née en 1275, à France, son père, Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR en 1306. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1346, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne d'HARCOURT 1275 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux 35 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT 36. Sie hat 1306 Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1346 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne d'HARCOURT è nata il nel 1275 nel Francia, sua padre, Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR nel 1306. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1346, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France: フランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルト
ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne d'HARCOURTが1275年にフランスで生まれた時，父Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preuxは35歳，母Jeanne de CHATELLERAULTは36歳であった。1306年にHenri IV d'AVAUGOURと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1346年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne d'HARCOURT(이)가 1275년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1306년 Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne d'HARCOURT nasceu em 1275, em França, seu pai, Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR em 1306. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1346, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne d'HARCOURT родилась в 1275 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR в 1306 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1346 г. в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne d'HARCOURT nació en 1275, en Francia, su papá, Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Henri IV d'AVAUGOUR en 1306. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1346, a la edad de 71 años.
